Local First

Isa non-profit organization that leads the development of an economy grounded in local ownership that meets the basic needs ofpeople,buildslocalwealth and social capital,functions in harmony with our ecosystem, and encourages joyful community.
Local First support locally owned business
LocalisntaplaceitispeopleItsreintegating our livesconnecting in practical ways withthe people we live and work withLocal First is another way of saying"People first."

LOCAL EAT 
LocalFirst

Local isn't just a place on a map. It's people:your neighbors and their families,their businesses,farms, nonprofits, events,and recreational venues.Local is a community and all ofthe opportunities we create together and challenges we work to overcome.Local First hasa passion forpeople living and working together in sustainable community.
When we say local, we mean:
Locally Owned
Headguartered in WestMichigan
PrivatelyHeld(not traded on the stock market)
By eating locallyull
Support our farmers
Strengthen our local economy
Ensure that you receive high quality food
Cultivate community
Eat sustainably while increassing healthy options
Why Local First?
1.Local First Engages.Itcreates and deepens relationships withina community,which becomes mare vibrant through collaboration and mutual investment
2.Local First Humanizes.Physical and economic development occur ona scale that mrtures people and encourages beauty in nahural and manmade environments.
3.Local First Preserves.When more citizens are gemine stakeholders,protectinglocal economicand environmental value is ofmutual interest.
4.Local First Strengthens.When citizens and local businesses work togetherit catalyzes positive development and thecommunity has structural integrity to withstand economic downtums.
5.Local First Invests.Sustainable localeconomies and ecosystems grow into markets thatare greater than the sum of their parts.
6.Local First Encourages.Intimate connections between customersand buiesses fcilitateinnovation interactionand discovery,making for amore vibrant and resilient local economy.
7.Local First Enriches.Reinvesting success in customersemployeesand the local environmentmaes the entire community wealthier.
Contact Us
(616)808-3788info@localfirst.com 955Wealthy St.S.E.Grand Rapids,MI49506Localfirst.com/eat-local
Featured Business
Discover and shop at locally-owned,entrepreneurial businesses that invest in their community throughthe TripleBotom Line of people, planet, and profit.
HARMONY BREWINGCOMPANY

Harmony Brewing Company,located in Grand Rapids at1551 Lake Dr Se.offers rustic wood fired pizzas,with hand prepared dough and a unique twist.Goat cheese is used instead of cheese from cow's milk.providing more flavorwith less fat and fewer calories.A greatway to enjoy a pizza while still staying within a healthy diet!
FEAST
A Moveable Feastis a Grand Rapids based food truck serving deliclous food made using only the highest quality ingredients,with an emphasis on local producers and responsible production methods.
